name: PhantomFill: When the Form Demands an Answer, Language Models Invent One
summary: arXiv:2607.20492v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Language models in production do not write prose. They fill forms: JSON fields, function arguments, extraction templates. We show that the form its...
description: arXiv:2607.20492v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Language models in production do not write prose. They fill forms: JSON fields, function arguments, extraction templates. We show that the form itself causes hallucination. We ask thirteen models the same question about the same input and change only the answer format. The inputs are built so the question cannot be answered: a viral post showing...
author: Rana Muhammad Usman
